info.title: QRcodly API
info.description: The QRcodly REST API lets you create, manage, and track QR codes and short URLs programmatically. Features include dynamic QR codes with editable destinations, customizable styling, bulk CSV import, URL shortening with click analytics, tagging, shareable public links, and design templates. All endpoints require Bearer token authentication unless marked as public.

bearerAuth.description: Authenticate with a Bearer token. Pass your API key in the Authorization header: `Authorization: Bearer <your-api-key>`

get.description: Returns a paginated list of QR codes owned by the authenticated user. Supports filtering by name, creation date, content type, and assigned tags.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of items per page (1-100, default: 10)

parameters.name: where
parameters.description: Filter conditions. Each field supports operators: eq (equals), neq (not equals), like (contains). Date fields also support gt, gte, lt, lte.

parameters.name: contentType
parameters.description: Filter by content type(s). Accepts one or more of: url, text, wifi, vCard, email, location, event, epc

parameters.name: tagIds
parameters.description: Filter by tag ID(s). Only returns QR codes that have at least one of the specified tags

200.description: QR Code With Relations Paginated Response

limit.description: Maximum number of items per page

total.description: Total number of items matching the query across all pages

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the resource was created (ISO 8601)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the resource was last updated (ISO 8601), or null if never updated

name.description: User-defined name for the QR code (max 32 characters)

margin.description: Quiet zone margin around the QR code in pixels

image.description: Base64-encoded logo image to embed in the center of the QR code. Max size 1 MB.

hideBackgroundDots.description: Whether to hide QR code dots behind the embedded logo image

imageOptions.description: Options for the embedded logo image

type.description: Shape style of the QR code data dots: dots, rounded, classy, classy-rounded, square, or extra-rounded

style.description: Color or gradient for the data dots

dotsOptions.description: Styling for the QR code data dots

type.description: Shape style of the corner squares: dot, square, or extra-rounded

style.description: Color or gradient for the corner squares

cornersSquareOptions.description: Styling for the three corner squares (finder patterns)

type.description: Shape style of the corner dots: dot or square

style.description: Color or gradient for the corner dots

cornersDotOptions.description: Styling for the dots inside the corner squares

style.description: Background color or gradient

config.description: QR code visual styling configuration (colors, shapes, dimensions, embedded image)

url.description: The target URL that the QR code points to

isDynamic.description: If true, creates a dynamic QR code with a short URL redirect so the destination can be changed later

password.description: WiFi password (leave empty for open networks)

encryption.description: WiFi encryption type: WPA, WEP, or nopass (open)

title.description: Job title or honorific (e.g. Dr., Mr.)

isDynamic.description: If true, creates a dynamic vCard QR code with an editable short URL

address.description: Human-readable address (e.g. "1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA")

url.description: URL with more information about the event

startDate.description: Event start date and time as ISO 8601 string (e.g. "2025-06-15T14:00:00Z")

endDate.description: Event end date and time as ISO 8601 string (must be after startDate)

bic.description: BIC/SWIFT code of the beneficiary bank

content.description: QR code content as a discriminated union — the "type" field determines which data schema applies

qrCodeData.description: Raw data string encoded in the QR code

previewImage.description: URL to a preview image of the rendered QR code

createdBy.description: User ID of the QR code owner

shortUrl.description: Linked short URL for dynamic QR codes, or null for static QR codes

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the resource was created (ISO 8601)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the resource was last updated (ISO 8601), or null if never updated

name.description: User-defined name for the short URL

destinationUrl.description: The target URL that the short URL redirects to

qrCodeId.description: ID of the linked QR code, or null for standalone short URLs

customDomainId.description: ID of the custom domain used for this short URL, or null for the default domain

isActive.description: Whether the short URL is currently active and redirecting

createdBy.description: User ID of the short URL owner

deletedAt.description: Soft-delete timestamp, or null if the short URL is active

tags.description: Tags assigned to this QR code

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the resource was created (ISO 8601)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the resource was last updated (ISO 8601), or null if never updated

createdBy.description: User ID of the tag owner

qrCodeCount.description: Number of QR codes assigned to this tag

data.description: Array of items for the current page

schema.description: QR Code With Relations Paginated Response

schema.description: Bad Request — invalid input or validation failure

post.description: Creates a new QR code based on the provided data. Supports 8 content types: URL, Text, WiFi, vCard, Email, Location, Event, and EPC. If the QR code is dynamic (contentType=URL and isDynamic=true), a short URL is automatically generated and linked so the destination can be changed later. This endpoint is publicly accessible (no auth required) but rate-limited. Authenticated users get their QR codes saved to their account.

post.description: Generates multiple QR codes at once from a CSV file upload. Each row in the CSV maps to one QR code. All QR codes share the same styling configuration and content type. Returns an array of created QR code objects including any related entities.

post.summary: Create share link for QR code
post.description: Creates a shareable public link for a QR code. The share link allows anyone to view the QR code without authentication. You can configure whether the QR code name and a download button are shown on the public page.

showName.description: Whether to display the QR code name on the public share page

showDownloadButton.description: Whether to show a download button on the public share page

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: QR code UUID to create a share link for

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the resource was created (ISO 8601)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the resource was last updated (ISO 8601), or null if never updated

qrCodeId.description: ID of the QR code being shared

shareToken.description: Unique token used in the public share URL

showName.description: Whether to display the QR code name on the public share page

showDownloadButton.description: Whether to show a download button on the public share page

config.description: Display configuration for the public share page

isActive.description: Whether the share link is currently active

createdBy.description: User ID of the share link owner

400.description: Bad Request — invalid input or validation failure

fieldErrors.description: Field-level validation errors keyed by field name

schema.description: Bad Request — invalid input or validation failure

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token.

schema.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token.

403.description: Forbidden — you do not have permission to access this resource.

schema.description: Forbidden — you do not have permission to access this resource.

404.description: Not Found — the requested resource does not exist.

schema.description: Not Found — the requested resource does not exist.

get.summary: Get share link for QR code
get.description: Retrieves the share link and its display configuration for a QR code. Returns the share token and config options.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the resource was created (ISO 8601)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the resource was last updated (ISO 8601), or null if never updated

qrCodeId.description: ID of the QR code being shared

showName.description: Whether to display the QR code name on the public share page

get.description: Publicly accessible endpoint (no authentication required) to view a shared QR code by its share token. Returns the QR code image data, content, styling, and share display configuration.

parameters.name: shareToken
parameters.description: Unique share token from the share link URL

url.description: The target URL that the QR code points to

isDynamic.description: If true, creates a dynamic QR code with a short URL redirect so the destination can be changed later

password.description: WiFi password (leave empty for open networks)

encryption.description: WiFi encryption type: WPA, WEP, or nopass (open)

title.description: Job title or honorific (e.g. Dr., Mr.)

isDynamic.description: If true, creates a dynamic vCard QR code with an editable short URL

address.description: Human-readable address (e.g. "1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA")

url.description: URL with more information about the event

startDate.description: Event start date and time as ISO 8601 string (e.g. "2025-06-15T14:00:00Z")

endDate.description: Event end date and time as ISO 8601 string (must be after startDate)

bic.description: BIC/SWIFT code of the beneficiary bank

margin.description: Quiet zone margin around the QR code in pixels

image.description: Base64-encoded logo image to embed in the center of the QR code. Max size 1 MB.

hideBackgroundDots.description: Whether to hide QR code dots behind the embedded logo image

imageOptions.description: Options for the embedded logo image

type.description: Shape style of the QR code data dots: dots, rounded, classy, classy-rounded, square, or extra-rounded

style.description: Color or gradient for the data dots

dotsOptions.description: Styling for the QR code data dots

type.description: Shape style of the corner squares: dot, square, or extra-rounded

style.description: Color or gradient for the corner squares

cornersSquareOptions.description: Styling for the three corner squares (finder patterns)

type.description: Shape style of the corner dots: dot or square

style.description: Color or gradient for the corner dots

cornersDotOptions.description: Styling for the dots inside the corner squares

style.description: Background color or gradient

showName.description: Whether to display the QR code name on the public share page

showDownloadButton.description: Whether to show a download button on the public share page

404.description: Not Found — the requested resource does not exist.

schema.description: Not Found — the requested resource does not exist.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of QR code styling templates created by the authenticated user. Supports filtering by name and creation date.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of items per page (1-100, default: 10)

parameters.name: where
parameters.description: Filter conditions. Each field supports operators: eq (equals), neq (not equals), like (contains). Date fields also support gt, gte, lt, lte.

limit.description: Maximum number of items per page

total.description: Total number of items matching the query across all pages

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the resource was created (ISO 8601)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the resource was last updated (ISO 8601), or null if never updated

margin.description: Quiet zone margin around the QR code in pixels

image.description: Base64-encoded logo image to embed in the center of the QR code. Max size 1 MB.

hideBackgroundDots.description: Whether to hide QR code dots behind the embedded logo image

imageOptions.description: Options for the embedded logo image

type.description: Shape style of the QR code data dots: dots, rounded, classy, classy-rounded, square, or extra-rounded

style.description: Color or gradient for the data dots

dotsOptions.description: Styling for the QR code data dots

type.description: Shape style of the corner squares: dot, square, or extra-rounded

style.description: Color or gradient for the corner squares

cornersSquareOptions.description: Styling for the three corner squares (finder patterns)

type.description: Shape style of the corner dots: dot or square

style.description: Color or gradient for the corner dots

cornersDotOptions.description: Styling for the dots inside the corner squares

style.description: Background color or gradient

config.description: QR code styling configuration stored in this template

createdBy.description: User ID of the template owner

previewImage.description: URL to a preview image showing the template styling

data.description: Array of items for the current page

get.description: Returns a paginated list of the authenticated user's short URLs. Supports filtering by destination URL, short code, and tags. Set standalone=true to only return short URLs that are not linked to a QR code.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of items per page (1-100, default: 10)

parameters.name: where
parameters.description: Filter conditions. Each field supports operators: eq (equals), neq (not equals), like (contains). Date fields also support gt, gte, lt, lte.

parameters.name: standalone
parameters.description: If true, only returns standalone short URLs (not linked to a QR code)

parameters.name: tagIds
parameters.description: Filter by tag ID(s). Only returns short URLs that have at least one of the specified tags

200.description: Short URL With Custom Domain Paginated Response

limit.description: Maximum number of items per page

total.description: Total number of items matching the query across all pages

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the resource was created (ISO 8601)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the resource was last updated (ISO 8601), or null if never updated

name.description: User-defined name for the short URL

destinationUrl.description: The target URL that the short URL redirects to

qrCodeId.description: ID of the linked QR code, or null for standalone short URLs

isActive.description: Whether the short URL is currently active and redirecting

createdBy.description: User ID of the short URL owner

deletedAt.description: Soft-delete timestamp, or null if the short URL is active

customDomain.description: Custom domain details, or null if using the default domain

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the resource was created (ISO 8601)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the resource was last updated (ISO 8601), or null if never updated

tags.description: Tags assigned to this short URL

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the resource was created (ISO 8601)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the resource was last updated (ISO 8601), or null if never updated

createdBy.description: User ID of the tag owner

qrCodeCount.description: Number of QR codes assigned to this tag

data.description: Array of items for the current page

schema.description: Short URL With Custom Domain Paginated Response

post.description: Creates a new standalone short URL (not linked to a QR code). A unique 5-character short code is automatically generated. Optionally assign a custom domain and set the active state.

destinationUrl.description: The destination URL to redirect to (must start with http:// or https://)

isActive.description: Whether the short URL should be active immediately (default: true)

customDomainId.description: ID of the custom domain used for this short URL, or null for the default domain

name.description: User-defined name for the short URL

get.summary: Get analytics for a short URL
get.description: Returns detailed analytics for a short URL: pageviews, unique visitors, sessions, bounce rate, time-series data, and breakdowns by browser, operating system, device type, and country. Only the owner can access analytics for their short URLs.

bounces.description: Total number of bounce visits (single-page sessions)

totaltime.description: Total time spent across all visits in seconds

shortUrlStats.description: Aggregate statistics for the short URL

date.description: Date label for this data point (e.g. "2025-06-15")

value.description: Numeric value for this data point

date.description: Date label for this data point (e.g. "2025-06-15")

value.description: Numeric value for this data point

viewsAndSessions.description: Time-series data for pageviews and sessions

label.description: Metric category label (e.g. browser name, country code)

count.description: Number of occurrences for this category

browserMetrics.description: Click breakdown by browser (e.g. Chrome, Firefox, Safari)

count.description: Number of occurrences for this category

osMetrics.description: Click breakdown by operating system (e.g. Windows, macOS, Android)

count.description: Number of occurrences for this category

deviceMetrics.description: Click breakdown by device type (e.g. desktop, mobile, tablet)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of tags owned by the authenticated user, including the number of QR codes assigned to each tag. Supports filtering by name and creation date.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of items per page (1-100, default: 10)

parameters.name: where
parameters.description: Filter conditions. Each field supports operators: eq (equals), neq (not equals), like (contains). Date fields also support gt, gte, lt, lte.

limit.description: Maximum number of items per page

total.description: Total number of items matching the query across all pages

tags.name: QR Codes
tags.description: Create, read, update, and delete QR codes. Supports 8 content types: URL, Text, WiFi, vCard, Email, Location, Event, and EPC (SEPA payment). Dynamic QR codes (URL type with isDynamic=true) automatically generate a linked short URL so the destination can be changed after printing.

tags.name: QR Code Sharing
tags.description: Manage shareable public links for QR codes. Create a share link to let anyone view and optionally download a QR code without authentication.

tags.name: Short URLs
tags.description: Create and manage standalone short URLs (not linked to QR codes). Each short URL gets a unique 5-character code and supports click analytics, custom domains, and active/inactive toggling.

tags.name: Analytics
tags.description: Retrieve click analytics for short URLs including pageviews, visitor counts, browser/OS/device/country breakdowns, and time-series data.

tags.name: Tags
tags.description: Organize QR codes and short URLs with colored tags. Tags can be assigned to both QR codes and short URLs for filtering and grouping.

tags.name: Templates
tags.description: Save and reuse QR code styling configurations as templates. Includes predefined templates available to all users and custom user-created templates.

tags.name: Public
tags.description: Publicly accessible endpoints that do not require authentication.
